full_text:
Liu Yong (Nanhe) 劉邕 (南和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yong (劉邕), styledNanhe (南和), was born in Nanyang. Joined Liu Bei during the Yizhou Campaign. Made Administrator of Jiangyang. Liu Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
